⚡ What to do now

overdue 1d
Mist thoroughly
today
Check it dried in 3–4h
💧 Watering ›
Mist/dunkNever long-soakDry <4h

Looks xeric but behaves mesic — humidity + bright indirect. Mist ~every 3 days; shake out trapped water, dry fast.

🟡 Bulbous rule: never a long soak — trapped water at the base = rot.
🩺 Dying, or just old? ›
Tough & dry = naturalSoft & slips out = rot

Tug test: a tough, dry tip is just age. A soft, mushy base = rot → pull from water, dry hard, more airflow.

🏔️ Calgary notes ›
Hard water → RO/distilled. Dry winters → mist more Nov–Feb. Low winter light → brightest window.
🪟 Display ideas ›
Driftwood/corkFooted dishClosed globe

At 18cm (M) it suits open, removable mounts that dry fast.
